indicator.title: CPS labor force flow, employed to other outflows
indicator.notes: BLS CPS research labor-force-flow series for outflows from the month-to-month matched sample; BLS API returned observations on 2026-06-01.

observations.footnotes: Data unavailable due to the 2025 lapse in appropriations.
Data unavailable due to the 2025 lapse in appropriations.
January 2026 estimates were revised to incorporate updated population controls. For more information, see www.bls.gov/cps/documentation.htm#pop.
